completion_criteria: Fix archived closeout proof confidence reporting is implemented, validated, and closed out honestly.

execution_run.what happened: Fixed closeout_report so archived closeout validation proof is represented as proof execution evidence without inflating structured intent-proof confidence. Placeholder proof text such as pending no longer satisfies the validation-proof blocker.
execution_run.scope touched: Workspace closeout_report projection and focused report CLI regression coverage.

finished_run_review.scope respected: The dogfooding finding was valid: closeout_report conflated recorded proof execution with missing structured proof confidence. The fix separates proof_execution from proof_confidence and filters validation-proof blockers only when real proof execution is recorded.
